data.title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Sells Nearly $36 Million Worth Of Dialysis Giant DaVita's Shares Amid Q4 Earnings Beat
data.description: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway has cut its stake in the dialysis provide DaVita Inc according to a U.S. SEC filing.

data.title: XRP Outshines Bitcoin, Ethereum After SEC Acknowledges Grayscale ETF Filing
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) emerged as one of the biggest large-cap gainers Thursday following the SEC's acknowledgment of its exchange-traded fund application by Grayscale Investments.

data.title: Nasdaq-Listed VinFast Records Uptick In 2024 Deliveries But US Figures Unknown
data.description: Vietnamese EV maker VinFast Auto on Thursday reported a whopping 192% increase in EV sales worldwide to 97,399 units. However, very few EVs were sold in the U.S.

data.title: Tim Cook Confirms New Apple Product Launch Next Week, Elon Musk Sets Off Buzz By Sharing — Is It The iPhone SE 4?
data.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook confirmed a Feb. 19 launch, likely for the iPhone SE 4, which is expected to feature an OLED display, A18 chip, Apple Intelligence, and Apple's first in-house 5G modem, with sales starting Feb. 28—potentially at a higher price than its predecessor.

data.title: 'I Think You Could Probably Freaking Struggle Through': Dave Ramsey Shocked By New Mom Whose Husband Makes $975,000 But Won't Let Her Quit Job
